texto: I think my biggest learning experience is that it's okay to be who you are - you don't have to exactly fit the mold of what people think a certain kind of career is. I think that discovery - of really knowing who I am and being okay with that and loving myself - was amazing.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Dree Hemingway sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “I think my biggest learning experience is that it's okay to be who you are - you don't have to ex…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, experience, myself, útil em momentos de myself e i-am.

frase_original: I think my biggest learning experience is that it's okay to be who you are - you don't have to exactly fit the mold of what people think a certain kind of career is. I think that discovery - of really knowing who I am and being okay with that and loving myself - was amazing.
